## What's Changed

- Added a server-side TV Guide page that shows planned The Tube channels, current programs, upcoming items, and the guide planning window.
- Moved The Tube TV Mode channel planning to a shared server guide so multiple Tater Tube players see the same channel schedule.
- Added automatic guide prebuild/refill in the server so channels are planned ahead instead of rebuilt only when playback starts.
- Reworked continuous The Tube channel streaming to feed FFmpeg from one longer concat plan instead of restarting FFmpeg at every video/commercial boundary.
- Improved video-to-commercial transitions by keeping FFmpeg timestamps and audio handling continuous across the planned channel window.
- Added FFconcat manifest handling and tests for live offsets, commercials, and filenames with apostrophes.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

Keep your existing `/config`, local media folders, commercial library, cache, and hardware device mappings.
